reviews.review_description:
I wasn’t sure how much I was going to like this game at first. The interface isn’t intuitive, the tasks are tedious, and communication with teammates is a pain when you’re too far apart. 

THAT SAID…once you get used to all that and get to around level 30, it’s actually a fun game. The thing that I learned to appreciate is just how chill it is for a zombie game. Sometimes I get on just to fish and cook them or make canned goods. 

Give it a chance. Get it on sale and work your way up to at  least level 20. Upgrade your weapons often, and make sure you use your skill points wisely. Have fun!

reviews.review_title: Love this game well made and very chill
reviews.review_description: I Have to say this game is a load of fun and a great laugh, fair enough when you and your friend are apart in the map you cant talk, but its a cool idea thats in the game grab the walkie talkie and your fine, my girlfriend dont really like games but she loves this game, just got to level 70 and still having a great laugh

reviews.review_title: Grand ambitions that could use tic..
reviews.review_description:
This isn’t a bad survival immersive game but the controls are one the most lacking parts because they aren’t as responsive as one would expect especially in this type of game.  They aren’t a bit glitchy but worse, they aren’t responsive, precise, or fast enough for this type of game so you might feel a bit frustrated.  Both teleport type and free movement have some responsiveness shortfalls that could make survival less certain.  The gun is pretty realistic though seemingly more difficult to be as accurate than with the target range.  And getting used to equipping new items in your quick menu has a bit of a learning curve that may take time getting used to because it’s not as seamless or intuitive as most similar games.  I only found one drop in the first some 10 enemies or so but don’t know if that’s normal.  Respawn is a bit quick which could make free exploration more challenging.  It’s not true FPS since you can only see your hands but oddly see your whole body only in mirrors so it can feel a bit off.  NPCs and interactions are at least above average.  Melee weapons makes me almost feel like it wants players to prefer them because it takes several rounds from the starter handgun to down first level enemies but only 2 or 3 melee weapon hits and you have to reload the7 round chambers 2 or 3 times before dropping one enemy.  This kind of makes the first gun feel a bit weak.  There’s options eventually for new clothes, supplies, and new melee and ranged weapons so it has quite a bit of gear equipment improvement options.

You get into things a bit faster then similar fps rpg games.  Other than the inventory to quick menu assignment procedures and slower slightly glitched movement controls , most other basic functions and controls are fairly standard; easy to use; and fairly intuitive.  While there’s some customization for player character m the range of options are a bit less than average and you may have some difficulty telling what you look like until you see the mirror because, your avatar face is small on screen with no zoom in option.

reviews.review_title: Really fun with a few bugs
reviews.review_description: Honestly a really fun survival game that doesn't overwhelm you with complex survival mechanics. It has a lot to it that's all done very simply, but that's not necessarily bad. Fun combat, decent skill system, and a huge map to explore. Game is still a bit buggy and feels a bit lacking in mechanics, particularly I would like to see more gun customization in the future. It would also be cool to see npcs that are hostile (like humans with guns) to fight against instead of just zombies. But is still fun and worth a try if you're a fan of open world survival games and if it's on sale.
Great game, pretty chill survival, PVP is honestly kinda dead, only real complaint is that you cant find ammo in the field.
I am a mazes by the game and I love it so much and so far it is my favorite game of all time
Good game my only complaint is the graphics.. I'm playing on a quest 3 and the graphics are under whelming .

When you try to reload your gun, it doesn't let you take the mag out of the gun. So you physically, it's like a one time use, I guess, and then when you try to fill up your ganty and I have to leave the game and join the game and then let me drop the canteen, this game sucks.

Its a very good zombies VR experience with the only comment for improvement whilst keeping it short is to expand with the game as it already is. 

For VR in this stage of its cycle it has plenty to offer zombies and survival fans alike, having spent more than 10 hours in game time with my friend and we still play.

It's everything its meant to be and is fun playing with xp incorporated, progression stats and elements to keep you thinking and taking care of what you have in your inventory. The progression system gives you a drive for more and is very rewarding with little bonuses along the way from gathering or NPC's.

Cant help but vision a more realistic approach to this game with this as a base model. Higher HP with perfect balance to the damage delt, I havent thought of any other ideas whilst playing. 🕹

Climbings fun in the game maybe the special zombies should have more purpose, i've seen one drop a schematic earlier, still ive had fun dealing with them and calling their names out to get a friends attention. If i wasnt minded in a way where dispatching a special for doing it and the fact theres multiple with differences theres no point really. However, i see this as a factor so to suit my idea would be to have another type/group or input where it is rewarding ultimetly providing a broader gameplay experience to suit everyone.

Deer's/stags drop one more steak piece compared to other sources, couldn't there be more ? Lether, hoofs, antlers. 

Further expand on every element and this title would deserve more stars, taking into account the stage VR is at the moment, 2/3 stars. Can it be built on though if not then 4 5 starts and thats it for my review.

- LLifon.
I bought the game I set everything up and I joined a server with 1 player and it bugged out I was stuck in the loading screen for 30 minutes and my screen kept freezing

reviews.review_title: Good game with a couple bugs
reviews.review_description: Good and chill but I've experienced a couple bugs that aren't that serious

Fun game. Needs a faster walk, and an actual sprint feature. Biggest issue is how quickly food & water meter goes down. On a quest 3, you need to eat 3-4 times if you're staying on the whole time. Accuracy is pretty good. Actually aiming by sights is good for long ranges (still using a pistol w/o a 2 handed grip), up to 100 meters, rarely missing. But glow in the dark sights would be wonderful. This is a great game for it being 

To the dev: Maybe make a slider menu to tailor how much players want to grind? And ALWAYS, I advocate for more maps. And fix the firearm/melee system. I'm left-handed primary, but ambidex. Left for aiming, right for strength/melee. Being restricted to one hand for that is annoying. Will probably be a bit much to change in this, but next game? And feel free to contact me if you need a playtester.

Terrible 
￼
trying now, very immersive!

its a fun game until everytime you have to kill a boss the playability epically fails, almost makes it so a person doesn't want to play Because it fails at the worse time, I definitely won't be gifting this game to anyone...
I’ve been playing hours until my head dies. It’s the best zombie game.￼

reviews.review_title: Game is great…when it used to launch
reviews.review_description: This game is one of the best VR zombie games out there, but for the past few months the game has refused to launch or even start and the devs on the discord haven’t been any help. Great RPG and great game, just won’t launch anymore

developer_response.body:
Hi, you can always reach us on Discord or support@wenklystudio.com

If game fails to launch, please try on device go to Storage and Clear app data selecting Survival Nation. This could help if local file on device is corrupted, but in Cloud Save there is correct one.

reviews.review_title: Great as is but could be greatly expand
reviews.review_description: great fun with a friend feels a bit like state of decay

reviews.review_title: Get this game . It's easy to understand
reviews.review_description: I'm in the 1 map and I don't mind doing the errands building money getting weapons changing my gear making a cocktail to throw . I don't feel over overwhelmed by zombies I did that one or two times I probably will die again as it progress as for now it's a great game great achievements and it's I'm so happy I got it .to see for my self. I'm already train and ready to go but I would say in my opinion this is a good game and I hope that they do add stuff to it even though I haven't even made it to the second map but I hope that they add things to it and make it interesting and keep it at a pace of not making it overwhelming because I think it's okay the way that it is and if you guys could add more clothes like more gear and more things to buy with the coins that would be great

The game is very entertaining, in the first map you can definitely tell that there was a lot of thought, time and effort put into making it. However, in the second map you can tell that it was quickly made & thrown into the game. I’m at level 71 and I can tell that this game is quickly coming to an end after reaching the second map. I wrongly assumed that the second map would’ve been a plentiful & an exciting experience. I speak for so many other players when I say we were let down. Thé vision and potential is there. Why not continue with this?

very low graphics, bad anims.
zombies are without variety, have the same animations every time, they’re boring, and aren’t assets made by the devs. 

guns are unrealistic, and very low in variety. and op weapons + ammo are honestly TOO easy to get.

hitboxes absolutely suck, the climbing mechanics are TERRIBLE, you fall randomly and grips are buggy when doing it, and running is pretty slow. 

everything is buggy, it’s entirely dead so multiplayer is out of the picture and single player is extremely boring.

very small map, same loot over and over again, bad crafting system, either too many or too few zombies everywhere. you die too easily as well, it’s just a couple hits from one zombie and you’re dead.

it feels like a crappy mobile game, it’s def overpriced, and has so much wasted potential.

only good thing is that it’s kinda fun a to grind for a bit, but that’s it. i strongly recommend you don’t get it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your honest review. The game includes several weapon types: pistol, shotgun, rifle, melee, and explosives. There’s also a second map: Winter Map, not sure if you had a chance to explore that yet.
As for the bugs, if you come across any, feel free to report them at support@wenklystudio.com. It really helps us improve the game. Thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts.

reviews.review_description: June 27, I purchased this game. As soon as I completed my avatar within the first few minutes,  a boy came up to me say there a woman in here let's rob her and pointing a gun in my faces and and would not stop saying bad things. I did not enjoy my first few minutes and had to leave out.

developer_response.body:
Hey, we're really sorry that this was your first experience with the game! We hope it won't be your last time in game!

If you'd like to play in RPG Story mode, you can always play solo without any other players.
If you're interested in PvP, there's an option to mute players, and we also recommend reporting them to the Meta. Unfortunately, we can't control which players you encounter, but we hope this hasn’t discouraged you from giving the game another chance. Let us know what you think of the game if you decide to come back!

reviews.review_description: Literally all you do in this game is walk around for miles, get loot you’ll probably never use, and run into people who just kill you without saying a word, the zombies are basic, overall there’s nothing to do you just walk and walk and walk and that’s it it’s not an open world cool survival it’s a game where you go into a room of 4 people max and aimlessly walk around trying to find some form of entertainment

This game is an amazing experience and an immersive experience had a fun time killing and mowing down zombies. Now we get to the bad part they coulda done more to this game missed a lot of opportunities and features they coulda made. It’s glitchy and was losing rewards and dropping stuff would disappear that’s why it got 3

reviews.review_title: Warning to new users, missed opportunity
reviews.review_description: This game could’ve been massive, but unfortunately it has been abandoned with plenty of broken and unfinished features, some force ui, and game breaking bugs such as the silly snowball mechanics. It’s a fantastic experience otherwise with great voice acting, fair missions, lots of exploring, two big open non loading maps. Skill trees, crafting, looting, animals to hunt, such as bears, hears,deer, boars, little lizards and rats running around the world, bugs buzzing around the dumpsters ,very dense areas, secrets to find, money to make, to upgrade weapons, and buy cosmetics that go along way when wanting to role play or just look cool when playing I multiplayer,literal day and night cycle, with rainy, or even foggy days, with an ambient soundtrack that can be adjusted to the players desire it’s pretty much what combat waffle wishes they can do with silent north but on a grander scale. But again since this game is abandoned they missed the opportunity to make the pvp lobbies larger with more added loot such as weapon attachments, new missions, and even a few more zombie variants. If they stuck with this game instead of trying to bite off more then they can chew with Astro hunters, and frost nation, features from both those games could’ve just been added to survival nation for the ultimate open world zombie experience on the platform. But naw….lol don’t get me wrong for what it is, it absolutely is a great a fun experience that actually has so much to offer, more then most vr games, I’d still highly recommend it, maybe down the road they’ll release a second one
This game is great fun but we ran out of quests to do about level 70. It was a big disappointment to run out of things to do in the game just as we finished upgrading our weapons to max damage.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing our game and sharing your feedback! We're happy to hear you enjoyed it. We have the second part of the Winter Map with new quests in the future plans. In the meantime, there’s still a lot to do, including side activities and the option to play PvP with friends. We hope you continue to have fun in Survival Nation VR!

reviews.review_title: I'm not a crybaby that cries about every
reviews.review_description: To start, I haven't encountered anything negative about the game. It's essentially become my go-to game. Unfortunately, it seems to have been abandoned, which is a shame because I really enjoy it. I've maxed out my weapons—I've got the best upgrades available—but I prefer using my bow, so I'm just accumulating money with not much else to do. Still, I find myself logging in to fish or battle zombies. It's definitely worth the price, although I got it on sale. It’s frustrating when developers create such enjoyable games only to leave them behind. I mean, I get that a game can reach a dead end with no further development, but it's still fun while it lasts. I remember a time I fell asleep with my headset on, and some guy startled me by shooting nearby—it scared me to death! I often wonder if he noticed I was sleeping. Just yesterday, though, I encountered someone cheating, which I don’t appreciate. They were glitching under the map—typical behavior from some younger players. Overall, though, I've met some pretty cool people in the community.

reviews.review_title: It's so boring and I can't even refund.
reviews.review_description: Hi. I bought this game today and Expected a really good Story but with what i Was met with was just pure Walking and Quests. It was really boring an when i Tried to refund it , its said I cant bc I used the App too long... Please let me Get a Refund and make the Game/Graphics better.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback!
We do not handle refunds directly. They are managed by the store.
We encourage you to give the game another chance. After completing the initial tutorials, there’s a lot to explore: main quests, side activities like climbing and treasure hunts, fishing, character progression, crafting, two large maps, and much more.

reviews.review_description: Dear developers, could you add an option to place the quiver on the back? In its current position, it’s easy to accidentally grab weapons from the side while shooting arrows.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing our game and for pointing this out! Please try going to Settings > Gameplay, then find the Weapons tab. At the very bottom, there is a Bow Offset option -try switching it from 'Off' to 'On' (or the other way around). That should help resolve the issue.

reviews.review_description: It's pretty cool and fun but wish the devs can add another area to explore. Also have more guns etc

developer_response.body: Hey! Glad that you enjoy the game and thank you for your suggestions. Have you already been to Winter Valley?

reviews.review_title: Not bad, the basis is there…
reviews.review_description:
It’s a pretty ok game, a lil pricey but I had fun my first time playing, definitely would like to see more QoL improvements. Like maybe be allowed to jump, fix the belt so it’s stationary and doesn’t spin around, had more haptics to things, also why is my character so much shorter than everyone else?(no I wasn’t crouching) 
Also the first mission with burning the best is bugged. Looking forward to hopefully see more improvements in the future and not just mediocre content drops

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for playing and sharing your feedback. We really appreciate it!  
For the height issue, please check if you're in standing or sitting mode in settings. If it still feels off, try recalibrating your position in the Meta settings.
As for the first mission bug, if you can share more details, please reach out to us at support@wenklystudio.com - we will investigate it.

reviews.review_description: Been playing this for some time now. Had a lot of fun with mates from work doing joint game play. Only 1 thing that’s popped up and that is map 13 on the snowy runway, I can’t seam to collect this one map. It’s the last thing I need to do for now before next stages. But overall a great and fun game to play.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your opinion. We're glad that you enjoyed the game.  When it comes to map 13, please contact us at support@wenklystuido.com or join our discord: discord.gg/wenklystudio - we'll help you investigate this issue :)

reviews.review_description: Me and my daughter love playing this game it has a great story line lots of quests the only thing it bugs me is ill be out on a quest gathering or hunting or killing zombies I have to go back to camp for water or food not enough room in back pack to store food and the water don't last long but other than that it's a great game add ways u can get water through out the world I will continue playing i love this game

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words!  We're so happy to hear that you and your daughter are enjoying the game and the storyline. 
Also, thank you for your suggestion. There's a skill in the game that can help increase your backpack slots, which might make it easier to carry more supplies while you're out exploring.

reviews.review_description: Bought this game last year, enjoyed playing it then out of the blue it stopped working… so frustrating!!!

developer_response.body: We're sorry that the game has stopped working for you. Please contact us at support@wenklystudio.com, and we'll help you resolve the issue. In your email, let us know which headset you are using when you last played the game, and whether the game failed to launch at all.

reviews.review_description: I love this game I was addicted to it but reach out maximum level. Please add more worlds to this amazing game. Is it possible?

reviews.review_title: Coop Zombie Survival at its Finest
reviews.review_description: My son and I have been playing this game together for a few months now and absolutely love going on missions and killing zombies together.    There are so many different aspects from shooting, to climbing, to fishing and hunting (animals and zombies). The maps are huge with tons to explore.  Highly recommend this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad to hear that you and your son are enjoying the game. Keep pushing forward, Survivors!

reviews.review_description: The 2nd map sucks and has way less thing to do than the first map so the devs either need to update the second map or add a new map for more things to do.

reviews.review_title: It needs to be easier to play online
reviews.review_description: I was getting tired of playing alone with no friends who play on vr so I created a discord community server so people can join and chat to arrange to play the game. Enter this code into discord to join.= vXWA2s6U

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing our game! 🎮 We truly appreciate your support.
We already have an official Discord server where you can find other Survival Nation players to team up with and chat. We invite you to join us here: https://discord.gg/wenklystudio

reviews.review_description: Absolutely fantastic game,l play this game with my son , the developers did an amazing job , please keep adding on 🤞
This is a very fun game I definitely would buy content from this dev if it comes with having such a fun time

Because the mission where you have to collect 5 sleeping bags in the beggining i got 3/5 then i left to do another mission then when i came back all the sleeping bags were gone i ignored it and went on to become level 43 but then i stopped getting new quests and i think that is because the mission from the beggining is impossible to finish please help i dont want to restart all that progress i dont have a pc

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry to hear about the issue you’re experiencing. We’ll do our best to help you as quickly as possible! To investigate the issue, could you please send us your save file?

Here’s how to do it:
- Connect your headset to your PC.
- Put on the headset, and you should see a prompt asking if you want to allow data access - Select Allow.
- Locate your headset as storage on your PC and navigate to the following path:
Android > Data > com.WenklyStudio.SurvivalNation > files
- Copy the file named localSave.wen and send it to support@wenklystudio.com.

If you have any questions, you can contact us at the email.

reviews.review_title: Pair up for the best experience
reviews.review_description: Absolutely love this game. The skill choices compliment the weapon upgrades to reflect a personalization of style of play. I often team up with friends and mow down zombies. Loads of fun! The only issue I would have with the game is that there are no more quests and I am at level 72. Level cap is 75 so I guess slaughtering zombies and fishing are in my future.
Yay

I've been playing this game for 3 days now, and I must say that this is the best zombie apocalypse survival game ever. (It's like the walking dead saints and sinners but has an open world and multilayer if you choose so.) But the online one is more fun to talk to other people on the walkie talkies and team up to complete quests and take out zombies together. I am looking forward to more updates as time goes by.
Currently stuck at the beginning of the game. Being told shoot the targets. Have no gun. Can’t progress. Going no where fast. I’ll restart it and try again.  To be continued ?????????

developer_response.body:
You can check your current quest and its steps on your watch or in the menu.
At this point, you need to go to Weapon Vendor Mike, who is located in the Main Camp, and purchase a weapon.
If you experience any further issues or need help with this quest, please contact us at support@wenklystudio.com.
If everything works and you're able to continue the game, we would appreciate it if you could leave us an honest review and feedback!

reviews.review_description: THIS IS MULTIPLAYER JUST PLAY AND TALK TO FRIEND BUT NO COOP. COOP IS WHEN WE HAVE THE SAME PROGGRESSION. PLEASE DO SOMETHING

To be completely honest this game has its ups and downs, for example: it's downs are graphics, zombie dying animations and some of the gun models along with the hands model, I just wish the hands were something like after the fall hand models, it's felt really small compared to my real hand, but really that's all the downsides to it everything else is fun to play I just wish that the zombies had ragdoll physics to make it more realistic in two hand melee weapons, another thing I want to complain about is the AK model I feel like the magazine is small and overall the gun is small compared to its real life counterpart, otherwise the guns are fun to play with I just wish there was more of a story being told and just tiny details like that, like how I wish that some areas had hordes of zombies instead of small patches of them, making some areas there is huge hordes of them and other areas you would find the occasionals common zombie, I just wish there was just more zombies around, otherwise this game is a really fun and replayable game highly recommend I just wish tiny details like I had described or added in which I think would make the game a lot more enjoyable.

Edit: 
I'd also like to add the lobby sizes for multiplayer it'd be most enjoyable if there were 20 or 40 people in each lobby is the map is huge there are many places to go, also please add a machete it's in one of the blueprints and I thought that you guys had one in the game please add it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re really glad to hear that you're enjoying the game! Player feedback is incredibly important to us, and we’ll be sure to pass your suggestions along to our development team for consideration. However, the zombie's ragdoll is already in the game. If you have any issues or suggestions please feel free to join our discord: https://discord.gg/wenklystudio or contact us at: support@wenklystudio.com

reviews.review_title: PLS answer-TIPS FOR THE DEVS! + 15% off!
reviews.review_description:
It's definitely a really fun and great game but there is somethings that I think could be better. 

Tip #1 The combat. I don't wanna be dumb or rude but the combat in this game is horrible in my opinion and I really think you guys should try to make it better. Please try making it like The Walking Dead Saints and Sinners combat.

Tip #2 I don't know if it's just me, but I think it should take longer time to cook your fish and meat, because it literally takes like 4 seconds and I think it would be nice to like sit at your campfire at night with your bro and just sit there and talking while you're both cooking and just chilling or maybe planing what quest we should take the next day or just something. Plus it would bring a bit more realism if it took longer time to cook. (Remember this is just tips that I think could make the game much better) 

Tip #3 I think this is something we all need and that's building. I mean just imagine you and your friends Having a base with a house, I don't know what it's called but you know those spiky walls, with traps. And then sometimes there comes big hordes of zombies attacking and trying to destroy you and your base and you need to defend it and kill the zombies.

Tip #4 Better qualitys on zombies and make some of them scarier. If those things happened that would definitely make me enjoy the game much, much more! 

Tip #5 Make some Incredibly large groups of zombies, that would make the game much harder and that would be great! 

Tip #6 Make it harder to get good guns. When I only had played for like 1 and a half hour I got the SMG and that made the game much easier for me and I want to have a challenge. 

Tip #7 Make it so that some skills cost 2/3/4/5 skill points that would make it harder to get good skills. 

Tip #8 Armor. I really think that there should be armor in the game. I think that would make the game better and then so we can craft it and then be able to upgrade you armor later on.

Tip #9 Being able to use 2 of your hands on your melee weapons and to be able to drop my weapons and not just put them in my inventory. I really think that you should be able to do these thing too, because it mostly feels better using both of your hands on melee weapons in my opinion so I think you guys should add that feature and I just think that you should be able to drop your weapons into the wild, because I don't see why you absolutely need to put it in your bag pack.

Tip #10 I really think you guys need to add a raid/horde event or something. Like sometimes at a random night there comes hordes of zombies attacking your base and you need to place traps or planks or something to defend your base so the zombies can't get into the base and then you can go up to the watchtowers and use your guns to kill them all so they don't come into your base and start destroying stuff and killing you and your friends.

There we go. That's all of my tips for now. I know it's many tips and it's hard to make, but if you make these features happen it would definitely make the game much, much better and we would all appreciate it so, so much. And I'm really excited for the improved enemy combat coming sometime in 2024! 

But I promise you that this game is already great and worth buying in my opinion. But all of these tips would definetly make the game much, much better. And I really hope that the quest 3 update that you guys are working on is big. Because there are so many games that say they update the game for quest 3 but the update isn't even that big of a difference, so please make it really good and big thanks! 

So the quest 3 update has now been released and if I'm gonna be honest, I'm a bit dissapointed. There is no difference in the zombie quality, no better water quality, no better anti aliasing, the only thing you realise is that it's more grass on the ground and reflections on the weapons which I know from Contractors a quest 2 already can handle. So please make it a bigger enhancement for the quest 3 because better graphics is a huge impact on my experience in vr and I know the quest 3 can handle much, much more than this quest 3 upgrade. But it's still better than nothing but please make a bigger sometime later.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you very much for playing our game and taking the time to write such detailed feedback! We really appreciate that. I'll pass on all your suggestions to our team.

Thank you for playing our game! If you’d like to share suggestions on what you’d like to see in the game, we’d love to hear from you. Feel free to join our Discord: https://discord.gg/wenklystudio.

We encourage you to give the game another chance – there’s a lot to explore and many things to do.

reviews.review_description: So many glitches and bugs and no updates. Game could be way better with graphics. Developers need a seriously good uodate

Please feel free to report any bugs and issues on our Discord:  https://discord.gg/wenklystudio or at support@wenklystudio.com. We'll do our best to fix them.

reviews.review_description: This game is great starts off a little slow but opens up and is a huge open world zombie survival game.

I recently got this game with a couple of my friends, we are new to vr but love survival games so this was our first choice. So far it’s been a great time. I couple things we would like to see is possibly being able to craft/scavenge ammo, instead of having to run all the way back to the supplier when we run out. A more in depth skill tree. Gun mastery camos. Long term if there was some sort of base building would be cool. Great game tho would recommend especially if more than one player. Will continue playing
Great zombie game. A few bugs but the developer has done a fantastic job. Highly recommend!!

When I first started this game it looked bland and boring and I couldn't talk to any NPC or rather, they didn't want to talk to me.

The more I've played the game has opened up so many mechanics like fishing, weapons upgrading and loads more that make the game so immersive!

I love to spend what little free time I have in this game it's so comfortable and relaxing.

Only criticism I have is that I would like to be able to lay on a sleeping bag or in a tent and just chill, as sometimes I just chill out with others online and talk.

I highly recommend this game it's well worth the money! ❤️

OK as an older gamer I have been severely disappointed by the quality or depth of quest games, I own a q3. I have played through walking dead 1 was great 2 immersion was broken by teleporting Zs and having to repeat same maps.
I played the free trial of AZS2 it's crap lacks no atmosphere and price tag is insane.
I looked at old reviews videos of this it looked bad but it was on sale so decided to look.
Voila a fully functioning zombie rpg, gfx are great, combat much better than expected, climbing is better than most games and the attention to little detail is immense.
Only tried singleplay but this is finally a title I won't refund.

average game at best; and that's being generous. But what really upsets me is that I played for MAYBE 30 minutes. Wasn't really my thing so I went to request a refund and it's telling me I am not eligible. Not sure how the devs managed to pull this one off, but that's some sketchy/scummy practice

developer_response.body: We apologize for any issues and problems you encountered while playing our game - if you have any suggestions about what you think should be adjusted or added, please let us know. Kindest regards - Aleksandra, Wenkly Studio

reviews.review_description:
Only reason I got this was for multiplayer (if you want a good zombie game just get saints and sinners) multiplayer was okay, but the game was awful, you don't do anything except collect random items and talk to npcs

The zombies in this game are hilariously stupid since they literally rise from the ground like some bollywood edits, and they take 3 HEATSHOTS to kill, doesn't make any sense they also sink into the floor when they die 😂

Solid 2/10
Just get The walking dead: Saints and sinners

developer_response.body: We are extremely sorry to hear your experience with the game was not satisfying. If you are interested specifically in multiplayer, we would like to note, we are still polishing that mode, and what I can also recommend to you is PVP mode where you can loot and combat against other players. Our team still has much in plans in that matter, so we hope you give us another chance and see what we have been working on. Kindest regards - Aleksandra, Wenkly Studio

reviews.review_title: This game has a lot of potential
reviews.review_description: I love this game. It’s fun to play with friends and explore and do the quests. The one thing that needs to help is UPDATES! For this game to grow you need to do more updates.
Multi-player RPG set in the zombie post apocalypse. What more could you ask for.
